title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 95.400 - Construction of law
text:
95.400.  Construction of law. — No law or act heretofore passed by any general assembly for the state of Missouri shall be in any way construed to abridge, impair or otherwise affect the provisions of sections 95.370 to 95.395.
(RSMo 1939 § 7159) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7009; 1919 § 8460; 1909 § 9362
